title: LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter locator with bed availability in Lane County. Not all shelters in Lane County are listed. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by shelter Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Couples Community Shelters * Homeless Families Community Shelters * Homeless Men Community Shelters * Homeless Veterans Community Shelters * Homeless Women Community Shelters * Homeless Youth Emergency Shelter Clearinghouses Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION LOCATOR HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS LOCATOR UTILITIES - EMERALD RATE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM UTILITIES - LIHEAP WAITLIST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
